  python:

name: pyodps

about.summary: ODPS Python SDK and data analysis framework
ODPS Python SDK and data analysis framework

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: pyodps
  version: "0.12.6"

package:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/${{ name[0] }}/${{ name }}/pyodps-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 76e4f12adb05c90f0858e14a1dbb326c79fa190e6e3f948a2fb256aee98391b6

build:
  number: 1
  script: ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation
  python:
    entry_points:
      - pyou = odps_scripts.pyou:main
      - pyodps-pack = odps_scripts.pyodps_pack:main

requirements:
  build:
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then: python
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then: cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then: wheel
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then: cython >=3.0,<3.1
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
  host:
    - python
    - pip
    - if: match(python, "<=3.11")
      then: setuptools <64
    - if: match(python, ">3.11") and match(python, "<=3.12")
      then: setuptools <70
    - if: match(python, ">3.12")
      then: setuptools <90
    # yes, wheel is really needed (for python 3.13 at least)
    - wheel
    - if: not win
      then: cython >=3.0,<3.1
  run:
    - python
    - requests >=2.4.0
    - pyarrow >=2.0.0
    # not listed but seemingly needed
    - numpy

tests:
  - python:
      imports:
        - odps
        - odps_scripts
  - requirements:
      run:
        - pip
    script:
      - pip check
      - pyou --help
      - pyodps-pack --help

about:
  summary: ODPS Python SDK and data analysis framework
  license: MIT AND Apache-2.0
  license_file: License
  homepage: http://github.com/aliyun/aliyun-odps-python-sdk
  repository: http://github.com/aliyun/aliyun-odps-python-sdk

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - xylar

about.summary: ODPS Python SDK and data analysis framework
